intentSynonyms: fetch a single subtasks in asana
view one specific subtasks in asana
list subtasks of a task in asana
description: List subtasks of a parent task. Supports pagination with limit and offset.

task_gid.description: Parent task GID to list subtasks for

limit.description: Maximum number of subtasks to return (default 20, max 100)

offset.description: Pagination offset from a previous response
